runtime.startupWorkaround: Node lstat was denied on C:\Users\w10, so the backend was started from a physical runtime copy at C:\Users\Public\zenhr-runtime with explicit DATABASE_URL.

limitations: Employee check-in browser flow found the seeded employee already clocked in, so the UI geofence check was validated by disabled-state UX plus API geofence behavior rather than creating a second live clock-in.
Expected transient 401 dashboard calls during browser session reset/login were captured by Chrome logs and classified as non-critical; no unexpected 500s or route crashes were observed.
Production build retains the pre-existing layout.component.scss budget warning; build exits successfully.
A temporary C:\Users\Public runtime copy was used only to work around the local Windows ACL issue for Node realpath traversal. Source patches remain in the workspace repo.
